name: Rocket Fuel Tycoon
description: Rocket Fuel Tycoon is an incremental idle game where you build and manage a fuel empire across the cosmos. Extract oil from refineries, fill rockets, and launch them into the sky to earn massive profits. Upgrade your equipment, hire workers, expand your territory, and progress through unique eras — from Earth to a Dimensional Nexus. Unlock cosmetic skins, prestige for permanent profit multipliers, and watch your space tycoon grow from a simple oil pump to an intergalactic fuel monopoly. Every prestige run unlocks new eras, rockets, and challenges. Features: Build and upgrade 7 oil refineries with unique animations Launch 3 customizable roc
instructions: WASD mdash Move your character SPACE mdash Jump SHIFT mdash Sprint E mdash Buy Interact Q mdash Upgrade capacity R mdash Free upgrade watch ad C mdash Toggle camera Right Click Drag mdash Rotate camera Scroll mdash Zoom in out Mobi
